{{Quote|There are the Twin Suns... two Twi'lek slaves from Ryloth, slaves who killed their Masters and developed a taste for it. They have mastered a dance of death. Very beautiful, very dangerous.|translated=1|[[Vossk]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Seer'aa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]], who worked in partnership with [[Teer'aa]]. Once slaves from Ryloth, they killed their Masters and then became bounty hunters known as the [[Twin Suns (assassins)|Twin Suns]], using deadly [[Twi'lek spinning blade|blades]] along with [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shields]].

In [[3951 BBY]] [[Atton Rand]] faced them in a cantina while separated from [[Meetra Surik]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and defeated them. Surik, along with two of her companions, later faced them aboard the ''[[Visionary]]'' and [[Death/Legends|killed]] Seer'aa and her partner shortly before it exploded.

==Biography==
Born on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], Seer'aa and Teer'aa were sold into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] at young age. At some point they killed their master, taking their first steps into the career of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].

During the aftermath of the [[Jedi Civil War]], the Twin Suns traveled on the ''[[Visionary]]'' with several other [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. [[G0-T0|Goto]] instructed them to capture [[Meetra Surik]] alive, informing them that [[Death/Legends|death]] would not be tolerated.

They successfully tracked down Surik's companion [[Atton Rand]] while Surik was in the [[Jekk'Jekk Tarr]]. At first, they attempted to get Atton to come with them peacefully, but soon resorted to violence. Atton managed to defeat them and escape. The outcome of the first encounter angered the duo, so they returned to the ''Visionary'', where they waited for Surik and her friends. They finally got their chance just as the ship was falling apart. They tried to kill Surik, but she and two of her companions killed them. Their bodies were destroyed when the ''Visionary'' exploded.

==Behind the scenes==
Seer'aa and Teer'aa appeared, though unnamed, in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' video game. Their names were later revealed by [[Leland Chee]].<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1380#16660523|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-06-04|time=3:28 PM}}</ref>

If Atton comes aboard Goto's ship to rescue the Exile, he will groan at the sight of Seer'aa and her partner, and promises they will both stay down in the ensuing battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
